playbook.intent: Raw weekly research artifacts -> 3-7 actionable insights + linked backlog items + next-prototype theme.
playbook.scope: Designer/researcher runs a weekly 2-hour synthesis. Includes review of artifacts, AI-assisted coding, insight write-up with evidence, linkage to design backlog, and a top-theme selection. Done when insights are filed and the next prototype theme is picked.

success-criteria.criterion: 3-7 insights written with >=3 evidence points each
Each insight linked to a design backlog item or opportunity
Top theme picked for next prototype
Insights filed in the research repository

stage.name: Inventory

tasks.task: Confirm artifacts are filed + named correctly

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when inventory is complete.

stage.name: Cluster

tasks.task: Tie themes to JTBD + pain points

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every theme has >=3 evidence points.

stage.name: Insight write-up
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each card has claim + evidence + implication.

stage.name: Backlog + theme

tasks.task: Link each insight to a design backlog item
Pick top theme for next prototype

stage.decision-gate: Done when the next prototype theme is picked and scheduled.

extra.value: [Themes with <3 evidence points -> fragile insights, Insights without backlog links -> research dies, No top theme -> next prototype lacks focus]
['Does each insight have claim + evidence + implication?', 'Are insights linked to backlog?', 'Is the next prototype theme on the calendar?']

{human: faion get-content research-insight-synthesis-2hrweek --format md, agent: faion get-content research-insight-synthesis-2hrweek --format context, json: faion get-content research-insight-synthesis-2hrweek --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
